feature: High-contrast industrial Material 3 theme with sunlight and low-light modes
description: Design a Material 3 color scheme optimized for industrial environments — high contrast ratios (minimum 7:1 for body text, 4.5:1 for large text), distinct semantic colors for scan states, and automatic or manual switching between 'warehouse daylight' (high brightness, reduced color saturation) and 'standard' modes. Replace the POC's generic green/pink AppCompat theme.
